---
name: New division proposal
about: Propose a new functional division folder and category classification
title: "[NEW DIVISION] Proposed division name"
labels: new-division
assignees: ''
---

**Division Name (proposed)**
Provide a kebab-case identifier (e.g. `ai-engineering`) and a human-friendly display name (e.g. `AI Engineering`).

**Category**
Select or suggest a high-level category (e.g. `AI Engineering`, `Cloud Engineering`).

**Why this division is needed**
Describe the scope of agents that will be placed under this folder and why existing divisions cannot contain them.

**Suggested Initial Agents (5+ agents)**
Provide a list of proposed agent names to seed the division.
- `[ ]` agent-1
- `[ ]` agent-2
- `[ ]` agent-3
- `[ ]` agent-4
- `[ ]` agent-5
